title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
description: Test that enabling the Remind Me option triggers a WhatsApp notification delivery 24 hours prior to trial expiration
preconditions: User has active trial with remaining days
User is on Trial Corner Hub

steps.description: 2. Locate the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle
5. Wait for 24 hours before trial end or simulate time

expected_result: User receives WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends confirming reminder is set, and toggle shows as enabled
